_note: v3: framing fix from real batches — v2's 'loot at their feet' + 'low-angle shot' made SDXL crop to boots. Full body demanded, crops banned in the negative.
template: {game} video game key art: full-body armored {subject} visible head to toe, centered in a recognizable {game} landscape, signature {game} creatures and scenery in the background, faithful {game} art direction, glowing legendary loot beside them, {palette} palette, {lighting}, dynamic medium-wide shot, clean bottom band left empty for composited text
negative: text, letters, words, watermark, blurry, low contrast, dull colors, extra limbs, generic fantasy setting, unrelated game, close-up, cropped body, feet only, legs only, headless

rubric.game_reference: 1-5 — is THIS game unmistakable (creatures, environment, art style)?
rubric.framing: 1-5 — full subject in frame, not a body-part crop?
